first_run.rationale: The score is identical in both evaluations, and the reasoning is substantively the same. Both the baseline and variant correctly identify the same critical gaps: insufficient C++ experience (specifically the ~7 month duration), a lack of the required financial domain knowledge (fixed income/derivatives), and missing database experience (SQL Server/Oracle). The minor variations in wording are well within the expected range of run-to-run noise and do not indicate that the model relied on the redacted name or personal information.
